Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### fireeye-hx-get-data-acquisition
***
Gather artifacts from the system disk and memory for the given acquisition id. The data is fetched as mans file
#### Base Command
`fireeye-hx-get-data-acquisition`

#### Command Example
Human Readable Output
#
Error Responses - Timeout Error
#
Timeout error
indicates that time limitation for the command has exceeded before results are returned.
To resolve this issue, configure new time limitation for the command.

outputs.description: The acquisition unique ID. FireEyeHX.Acquisitions.Data.state The acquisition state
